sanctioned-node.label: Sanctioned / Restricted Nation Node
sanctioned-node.description: Node is marked by the local sanctioned-jurisdiction policy classifier. Red ring is mandatory.

policy-restricted-node.label: Policy Restricted Node
policy-restricted-node.description: Node is marked by local policy restriction rules. Red-orange ring is mandatory.

high-threat-infrastructure.label: Confirmed / High Threat Infrastructure
high-threat-infrastructure.description: Defensive threat-infrastructure correlation or explicit trusted intelligence match. Not country-to-APT attribution.

confirmed-threat.label: Confirmed Intelligence Match
confirmed-threat.description: Explicit trusted intelligence-feed or confirmed source-metadata match.

duplicate-location.label: Duplicate IP / Multiple Nodes at Location
duplicate-location.description: Two or more advertised nodes share the same rounded map coordinate.

became-unreachable.label: Node Became Unreachable
became-unreachable.description: Node was previously known but failed the latest reachability check.

unreachable.label: Unreachable
unreachable.description: Node failed the latest reachability check.

not-yet-synced.label: Not Yet Synced
not-yet-synced.description: Node reports a block height below the current observed chain tip.

reachable-now.label: Reachable Now
reachable-now.description: Node was reachable in the latest crawl.

reachable-24h.label: Reachable Within 24H
reachable-24h.description: Node was seen during the 24-hour rolling window.

stable-1w-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 1 Week
stable-1w-plus.description: Node is synced with more than one week of observed uptime.

stable-48h-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 48h
stable-48h-plus.description: Node is synced with more than forty-eight hours of observed uptime.

synced-10m-plus.label: Synced / Uptime Over 10m
synced-10m-plus.description: Node is synced with more than ten minutes of observed uptime.

synced-under-10m.label: Synced / Uptime Less Than 10m
synced-under-10m.description: Node appears synced but has less than ten minutes of observed uptime.

synced.label: Synced
synced.description: Node appears reachable/synced without enough uptime metadata for a higher tier.

unknown.label: Unknown / Unclassified
unknown.description: Node does not yet have enough telemetry for reliable classification.

tor.label: Tor Node
tor.description: Node is reachable through the Tor onion overlay network.

i2p.label: I2P Node
i2p.description: Node is reachable through the I2P overlay network.

dns.label: DNS Hostname Node
dns.description: Hostname endpoint whose resolved address family was not carried into this vector record.

unknown.label: Unknown Network
unknown.description: Network family could not be classified.

suspected-vpn.label: VPN / Suspected VPN Node
suspected-vpn.description: Node is associated with VPN-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

suspected-proxy.label: Proxy / Suspected Proxy Node
suspected-proxy.description: Node is associated with proxy-like provider, ASN, or heuristic signals.

datacenter.label: Datacenter / Hosting / Cloud
datacenter.description: Hosting, VPS, cloud, CDN, colocation, or datacenter network.

government.label: Government Network
government.description: Government-associated organization, ASN, domain, or classifier hit.

military.label: Military / Defense Network
military.description: Military, defense, or armed-forces-associated network classification.

threat-actor-label.label: Explicit Threat Actor Label
threat-actor-label.description: Actor/group label surfaced only from trusted metadata or feed fields.

known-malactor.label: Known Malactor
known-malactor.description: Node matched a local known-malactor intelligence list.

public.label: Public / Residential / Civilian
public.description: Ordinary public internet, residential, or civilian node classification.

private.label: Private Company / Commercial Network
private.description: Commercial, enterprise, hosting, or privately operated network.

government.label: Government
government.description: Government-associated organization, ASN, domain, or classification match.

military.label: Military / Defense
military.description: Military, defense, or armed-forces-associated network classification.

university.label: University / Academia / Institute
university.description: Academic, research institute, university, or educational network classification.

datacenter.label: Datacenter / Hosting / Cloud
datacenter.description: Hosting, cloud, VPS, CDN, colocation, or datacenter network.

ngo.label: NGO / Nonprofit / Civic Institution
ngo.description: Nonprofit, civic, foundation, or public-interest institutional network.

red_ring_semantics.is_sanctioned_node: red marker ring and SANCTIONED table badge
red_ring_semantics.is_policy_restricted_node: red-orange marker ring and RESTRICTED table badge
red_ring_semantics.confirmed_or_high_threat: red marker/ring and THREAT/CONFIRMED table badge
